title: Analyse data and report results
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Analyse data and report results demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Perform scientific calculations

pcs.text: Ensure raw data are consistent with expectations and reasonable ranges
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure raw data are consistent with expectations and reasonable ranges?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure raw data are consistent with expectations and reasonable ranges.

pcs.text: Calculate scientific quantities involving algebraic, power, exponential and/or logarithmic functions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate scientific quantities involving algebraic, power, exponential and/or logarithmic functions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate scientific quantities involving algebraic, power, exponential and/or logarithmic functions.

pcs.text: Ensure calculated quantities are consistent with estimations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure calculated quantities are consistent with estimations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure calculated quantities are consistent with estimations.

pcs.text: Present results using the appropriate units, uncertainties and number of significant figures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present results using the appropriate units, uncertainties and number of significant figures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present results using the appropriate units, uncertainties and number of significant figures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine linear and non-linear relationships between sets of data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and analyse control charts to determine if a process is in control.

pcs.text: Identify possible causes for out-of-control condition

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify possible causes for out-of-control condition.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures to return process to in-control operation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures to return process to in-control operation.

elements.title: Determine variation and/or uncertainty in data distributions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate statistical parameters of grouped and/or ungrouped data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret frequency distributions to determine the characteristics of the sample or population.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate standard deviations and confidence limits for means and replicates.

pcs.text: Determine data acceptability using statistical tests and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine data acceptability using statistical tests and workplace procedures.
